{{Quote|Imperial scientists have been unavailable for comment, but reports of mutations of other common species have been surfacing on Talus as well.|''[[Coronet Gossip]]''|<ref name="SWG:P18">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=other|Loading Screen: Publish 18}}</ref>}}
The '''kahmurra blanca''' was a subtype of [[kahmurra]],<ref name="SWG:TTE" /> a race of [[Murra/Legends|murra]] [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] in the [[Kahmurra Biogenetic Research Station]] on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> A [[Mutant|mutated]] variant,<ref name="SWG:P18" /> this creature was larger, stronger and more resistant to average kahmurra. It also had large horns and tusks.<ref name="SWG:TTE" />

The existence of the kahmurra blanca was first reported during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:P18" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> adventurous [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] traveled to Talus in order to hunt painted spats. At least one was known to be found near the Kahmurra Biogenetic Research Station.<ref name="SWG:TTE" /> The heads of these animals were sometimes displayed as a trophy by locals and big-game [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] who had killed them.<ref name="SWG:TTE" /><ref name="SWG:TC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Trophy Creatures}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Kahmurra blancas appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TTE" /> prior to the [[Star Wars video games|game's]] closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Kahmurra blancas were added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 18 Notes for 15 Jun 2005|Publish 18]]," released on [[June 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 18.0">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=archive%202005#june|text=Publish 18.0}}</ref>
